001package net.pl3x.guithium.api;
002
003import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
004
005/**
006 * Unsafe utils
007 */
008public abstract class Unsafe {
009    private Unsafe() {
010        // Empty constructor to pacify javadoc lint
011    }
012
013    /**
014     * Cast object to T
015     *
016     * @param obj Object to cast
017     * @param <T> Type to cast to
018     * @return Object as T
019     */
020    @NotNull
021    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
022    public static <T> T cast(@NotNull Object obj) {
023        return (T) obj;
024    }
025}
